topic: Area of squares and problem solving
latex:
A square vegetable garden has side lengths of $12$ feet. You plant flowers in the center portion of the garden, a square that has side lengths of $8$ feet. You divide the remaining space into $4$ equal sections and plant tomatoes, onions, zucchini, and peppers. What is the area of the onion section?

The area of the onion section is $\underline{\hspace{1cm}}$ square feet.
